news.paragraph: Fortinet (FTNT) saw a 5.9% increase following the expansion of its NVIDIA-powered FortiAIGate AI security capabilities. This development places FTNT among cybersecurity stocks projected for rapid growth through 2028, with recent analysis suggesting some are currently undervalued. The company's revenue trends are also being compared against competitors like Palo Alto Networks, indicating ongoing investor scrutiny of its market position and growth trajectory.

headlines.title: Why Fortinet (FTNT) Is Up 5.9% After Expanding NVIDIA‑Powered FortiAIGate AI Security Capabilities
Fortinet vs. Palo Alto Networks: What Do Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors?
